description: Screenshot of a Fortune news article on a white background. The bold black serif headline reads 'Meet a 23-year-old electrician who was a 'good student' but skipped college to join Gen Z's blue-collar revolution. He makes 6 figures'. Below it: the byline 'BY NICK LICHTENBERG' and a date 'September 14, 2025 at 9:00 AM EDT', with a circular share icon at right. The lower half is a photograph of a smiling young man with long brown hair in a black work shirt, arms crossed, wearing a black-and-white 'PMR' ball cap and standing in front of a red service truck or cabinet marked with the 'PMR' logo and a partial phone number; shelving with parts is visible at left. The tweet text reads: 'Jacob Palmer decided to go straight into the Skilled Trades after high school instead of attending college. He now makes SIX FIGURES.'
notable_text: Meet a 23-year-old electrician who was a 'good student' but skipped college to join Gen Z's blue-collar revolution. He makes 6 figures
